title: xanthium orientale var. saccharatum
intro: Xanthium orientale var. saccharatum, also known as Chinese cocklebur, is a plant species within the dandelion family, native to East Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its seeds, which contain sesquiterpene lactones that have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to have health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and relieving pain, as well as displaying antimicrobial and antiviral properties. The seeds of Chinese cocklebur are often used in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, to support immune function and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues.
